title: Seele logo revised

[]: Seele logo revised... Post by corintium » Tue May 01, 2007 10:43 pm The topic is simple, we know how the new logos looks like, but have we thought about how are they going to work on the actual Weba release? I mean, especially for that fugly *IMO* Seele logo?? Ok, I was bored and I had some spare time on my hands and a nice computer with photoshop installed......so sue me if you don't like it, but I come up with this thingy: ...a little something for you to think about.... and its comparative..... Well, hope this gives you people something to think about, or laugh about, ot rant about, or whatever....(It does looks peculiar in some way)
